title: EccKey missing Debug impl — public type unusable in debug-deriving structs
description: EccKey<'dev> in wolftpm/src/key.rs has no Debug impl. Device was fixed in r9tpo.15 (manual impl showing pointer). EccKey contains two WOLFTPM2_KEY C structs (opaque, likely no Debug from bindgen) and &'dev mut Device. Add a manual impl showing at minimum the pointer address of self.key, mirroring Device's pattern: f.debug_struct("EccKey").field("key", &format_args\!("{:p}", &self.key)).finish(). A caller who wraps EccKey in a struct and derives Debug gets a compile error with no clear fix.
